task_description: Build two new features: (1) Interactive Filler Timeline component for filler-list pages with colored episode blocks, tooltips, arc grouping, and share button. (2) Anime Calendar page at /calendar with weekly airing schedule from AniList, real-time countdown timers, navigation links, sitemap entry, and 'Currently Airing' homepage highlights.

verification.summary: npx next build completed with exit code 0. All pages generated successfully including /calendar with ISR. 5 review issues (unbounded retry, timezone mismatch, dead API route, ISR latency, hydration mismatch) were identified and fixed. Final build clean.
